name: Enchilada Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground turkey, thawed if frozen
1/2 of 4 oz. can mild chopped green chilies
2 cups grated Cheddar & Monterey Jack cheese, mixed
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the thawed ground turkey into a casserole dish or bowl.
2. Add chopped onion and green bell pepper, and minced garlic. Cover with wax paper.
3. Microwave on High for 4-6 minutes, stirring twice to break up chunks until no pink remains.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, enchilada sauce, chili powder, cumin, and chopped green chilies. Cover with wax paper.
5. Microwave on High for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring once or twice until the sauce is slightly thick and hot.
6. Assemble by placing one tortilla at the bottom of a deep microwave-safe casserole dish.
7. Top with one-fourth of the sauce and one-fourth of the cheese. Repeat three times using all ingredients.
8. Cover with wax paper and microwave on High for 3-5 minutes.
9. Cut into wedges. Serve with sour cream, lettuce, and black olives.
